## Meeting Purpose

[Review Adventures Group's content strategy and discuss next steps for SEO optimization and content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on revenue-driving content, prioritizing English-language articles (84% of traffic, 90% of revenue)](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [Optimize existing tour pages (120+) and create pillar content for key destinations](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Implement a strategic approach to content localization, focusing on high-performing topics](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Improve communication channels, potentially resolving Slack access issues for better collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Align with travel industry trends: focus on higher-end products, remote work, and blended business/leisure travel](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Goal: Increase revenue by 20% by 2025 vs. 2024](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Prioritize high-intent moments and connect topics to specific tours/services](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Leverage local expertise to differentiate from competitors like Booking.com and Lonely Planet](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)

### SEO Optimization Opportunities

  - [Create comprehensive travel guides for each destination (e.g., Cancun, Puerto Vallarta)](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - Optimize for high-volume keywords: "What to do in \[destination\]" (currently ranking \#30 for Cancun)
  - [Develop pillar pages for key topics, incorporating existing content](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Address duplicate content issues and inconsistent URL structures](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)

### Content Localization Strategy

  - [Current traffic: 84% English for both tour pages and blog content](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Revenue: 90% from English-speaking countries](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Proposal: Selectively localize top-performing content to Spanish, focusing budget on English content for higher ROI](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [Consider SEO implications of extensive localization (crawl budget, website authority)](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Utilize AI-assisted workflows to generate initial drafts](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Implement human-in-loop editing to refine and customize content](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Start with "calibration articles" to align tone and style with Adventures Group's preferences](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Adventures Group team to meet internally on Saturday to review presentation and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=2696.0)
  - [Mariana to share calibration articles via email for team review](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=2714.0)
  - [Kyle to send fresh Slack invitations and potentially assist with access issues](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=2867.0)
  - [Adventures Group to provide feedback on strategy and calibration articles by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=2988.0)
  - [Discuss and potentially share stock photo access for generic images](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=3042.0)
  - [Schedule next week's meeting to review strategy feedback and present more content](https://fathom.video/share/ZHrt_DXDJ4RMbrLzGTF3KVQYG33QMSq4?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)
